mapper.select: SELECT * FROM category ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM category WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM category WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (name, type, icon, color, user_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{icon}, #{color}, #{userId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bill WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
